---
name: 'agileagentcanvas-index-docs'
description: 'Generates or updates an index.md to reference all docs in the folder'
---

In all BMAD resource files, the template variable {bmad-path} resolves to: c:\Users\SummerNeal\.vscode\extensions\msayedshokry.agileagentcanvas-0.4.1\resources\_aac
The template variable {project-root} refers to the workspace/project root directory.

Read the entire task file at: c:\Users\SummerNeal\.vscode\extensions\msayedshokry.agileagentcanvas-0.4.1\resources\_aac/core/tasks/index-docs.xml

Follow all instructions in the task file exactly as written.
